000.Name: Roman Volkov, the Exile
000.Flavor Text: He digs graves to fill with those who betrayed him.

001.Name: Chancellor Lockwood
001.Flavor Text: A cunning strategist to push Rizland forward.

002.Name: Baron Valorin
002.Flavor Text: The Baron redefines the art of war.

003.Name: Zain Lioné
003.Flavor Text: The Brotherhood is the axe that takes off the head…

004.Name: President Zeana
004.Flavor Text: Only she knows the extent of her influence…

005.Name: Thato Lathabo
005.Flavor Text: Ingenuity, grit, and a good mix of clever profanities.

007.Name: Queen Awati
007.Flavor Text: An accomplished ruler, esteemed engineer, and pilot.

008.Name: Great Emperor Shang Lee
008.Flavor Text: The practice of Khanshu is total philosophy.

010.Name: Pons Research Centers
010.Flavor Text: Technology is the key to total victory.

017.Name: Mt. Pomé Orchards
017.Flavor Text: Verdant apple fields,far as the eye can see.

020.Name: EMP Discharge
020.Flavor Text: With just one pulse, we've gained the upper hand.
020.* Attributes: For a specific enemy, eliminate all air forces with a power resource cost. Their army and navy forces can't block this turn.

021.Name: Nuclear Aftermath
021.* Attributes: Each player loses 2 morale and eliminates all but 2 forces they control. Territories can't produce each next turn.

022.Name: Sub Launched Attack
022.* Attributes: Eliminate all soldier and army forces a specific enemy controls. You can only play this if you control a sub force in your legion.

023.Name: Chemical Augmentation
023.* Attributes: You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.

024.Name: Kinetic Space Strike
024.Flavor Text: Unleash the wrath of the gods...
024.* Attributes: Eliminate a specific enemy non-leader card.

027.Name: Ion Particle Cannon
027.Flavor Text: Perfect destruction, raining from the sky.
027.Pick 2: A specific enemy territory takes 150 damage.

029.Name: Sergeant Vladimir Orlov
029.Flavor Text: What is a mouse to a juggernaut?

031.Name: Agent Zarah Zivai
031.Flavor Text: In and out without a trace.

034.Name: Agent Nika Devin
034.Flavor Text: We have someone on the inside...

036.Name: Captured Leader
036.Flavor Text: Not so powerful now, are you?
036.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific enemy leader eligible for an attack. That leader can't be specified or use any countdown abilities.

037.Name: Abandoned Forces
037.* Attributes: Discard the top 7 cards of a specific enemy arsenal.

039.Name: Specialist Upton Cobani
039.Flavor Text: Whatever you do, don't ask him about the scars.

041.Name: Igor Bok, Electrical Engineer
041.Flavor Text: Let me optimize this for you.

042.Name: Jon Rider, Oil Engineer
042.Flavor Text: We'll find the oil we need.

045.Name: Corporal Mark Rockwell
045.Flavor Text: He's the man we want in position.

046.Name: Nathan Smith, Metallurgist
046.Flavor Text: He can forge just about anything.

047.Name: Reza Naveed, Air Defense
047.* Attributes: If this blocks an enemy air force, shuffle it into your arsenal after the battle.

050.Name: Sergeant Mickey Blackstone
050.Flavor Text: I'll put you in a grave!

055.Name: APEX-55 Mech
055.Flavor Text: It commands the scene on arrival.

061.Name: X6 Scorpion
061.Flavor Text: Now! Blast them out of the sky!

063.Name: A1 Poseidon Carrier
063.* Attributes: Can be specified for attack by navy and air forces.

064.Name: A4 Revenge Super Carrier
064.Flavor Text: It offers complete protection of our islands.
064.* Attributes: Can be specified for attack by navy and air forces.

065.Name: Isle Protector A8
065.Flavor Text: Move it! Get to your battle stations!

066.Name: ZP-C Shark
066.Flavor Text: She's the fastest ship in the fleet.

068.Name: GR Current
068.Flavor Text: Its effective attacks don't require a human operator.

069.Name: ZS Wolf
069.Flavor Text: You'll join the graveyard of the deep!

071.Name: GR Viper
071.Flavor Text: Able to venture into the deepest oceanic depths.

073.Name: AX Strike Fighter
073.Flavor Text: Agility is the key to winning the battle.

075.Name: Falcon R2
075.Flavor Text: When they first see the blast, it'll already be too late.

082.Name: H5 Drop Ship
082.Flavor Text: Jump when the light turns green!

083.Name: Hacked Network
083.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

084.Name: Search Algorithm
084.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

085.Name: Diversionary Tactic
085.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
085.Flavor Text: Draw them away from the hit site.
085.* Attributes: A specific enemy can't block during the next battle.

086.Name: Assassination Attempt
086.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
086.Flavor Text: Next time, we'll finish the job.
086.* Attributes: If you control an assassin force with stealth, a specific enemy leader takes 10 damage.

087.Name: Successful Mole Hunt
087.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
087.Flavor Text: Our agents have uncovered the informant.
087.* Attributes: Eliminate each spy you control but don't own.

088.Name: Satellite Recon
088.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
088.Flavor Text: Let's have a look from space…

089.Name: Secret Drone Mission
089.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
089.* Attributes: You can only play this if you control a drone force in your legion.

090.Name: Planted Device
090.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
090.Flavor Text: Fancy being a fly on the wall?
090.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific enemy building.

091.Name: Timed Detonation
091.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

092.Name: Pulled Critical Part
092.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
092.Flavor Text: Just wait 'til they try to fire it up!

093.Name: Field Research
093.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
093.Flavor Text: Go ahead and prepare the location for analysis.

094.Name: Novel Platform
094.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
094.* Attributes: Find 3 unique intel cards in your arsenal, show them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your arsenal.

095.Name: Optimized Outcome
095.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
095.* Attributes: Find a specific card in your arsenal and put it in your hand. Shuffle your arsenal.

096.Name: Targeted Sabotage
096.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
096.* Attributes: A specific enemy shows you their hand; discard a card from it. If it has a turn cost < 2, that enemy loses 1 morale.

097.Name: Restored Vehicle
097.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
097.* Attributes: Find a specific discarded army, navy, or air force with a turn cost < 2; show it; put it with your legion.

098.Name: Clever Hijack
098.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
098.Flavor Text: Much better suited to our needs.

099.Name: Sent Architectural Plan
099.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

100.Name: Destructive Hijacking
100.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
100.* Attributes: Eliminate a specific enemy non-soldier force without stealth, an attack value < 100, and a turn cost < 2. A specific territory takes damage equal to its attack value.

101.Name: Subversion Tactic
101.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
101.* Attributes: A specific enemy discards all but 4 cards. You can't play this on your first turn.

102.Name: Calculated Stagnation
102.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
102.* Attributes: Increase a specific non-leader timer by 1.

103.Name: Security Upgrade
103.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
103.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific non-soldier force in your legion. Enemies can't specify it.

104.Name: Cut Corners
104.Flavor Text: We don't need perfection; get this to the war zone!
104.* Attributes: Decrease a specific non-leader timer by 1.

105.Name: Rebuild the Territory
105.Flavor Text: It'll be as good as new.
105.* Attributes: Remove 50 damage from a specific territory in your legion.

106.Name: Strategic Shift
106.Flavor Text: Time to do this my way.
106.* Attributes: You can only play 1 instance of this per turn.

107.Name: Overtime Production
107.* Attributes: Each of your territories produces 1 extra resource.

109.Name: Non-Aggression Treaty
109.Pick 1: A specific enemy accepts this treaty.They can't specify your cards, affect your morale, or attack you next turn. You can't attack this turn. You gain 1 morale.
109.Pick 2: A specific enemy declines this treaty; they lose 3 morale.

110.Name: Mutual Disarmament
110.* Attributes: Return any amount of cards that aren't ready in your legion to your hand. For each card you return, lose 1 morale and each enemy returns a card in their legion to their hand.

111.Name: Final Devotion
111.Flavor Text: One final blind attempt at honor.
111.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific soldier force in your legion. If that force hits a territory, eliminate it and eliminate the force this is attached to.

114.Name: Propaganda
114.Flavor Text: Misinformation, or hype? Depends on who you ask.

115.Name: Inspire the Troops
115.Flavor Text: Today will be our finest hour!

116.Name: Naval Blockade
116.* Attributes: A specific enemy can't produce equipment on their next turn. You can only play this if you control > 1 navy force.

117.Name: Visit from Our Leader
117.Flavor Text: Thank you for your bravery and grit.

118.Name: Blackmail
118.Flavor Text: You wouldn't want to let this secret out, would you?
118.Pick 1: A specific enemy agrees to pay you 2 resources.
118.Pick 2: A specific enemy declines to pay you 2 resources; they lose 3 morale.

119.Name: Tsunami
119.* Attributes: Soldier and army forces can't attack or block.

120.Name: Violent Tornado
120.Flavor Text: The force of the storm is far too strong!
120.* Attributes: Air forces can't attack or block. Each player discards the top 3 cards of their arsenal.

122.Name: Freezing Rainstorm
122.Flavor Text: Relentless, icy sleet, freezing everything in its path.
122.* Attributes: Forces can't attack or block. Power territories can't produce.

123.Name: Terrifying Storm
123.* Attributes: Each territory and building takes 30 damage.

125.Name: Guard Tower
125.Flavor Text: Be on the lookout for movement…

127.Name: Laser Air Defense Station
127.Flavor Text: They can't escape our perfect aim.

128.Name: Interrogation Facility
128.Flavor Text: We'll get the info we need…

129.Name: Shadow Torture Facility
129.Flavor Text: It's a shame you made this so difficult…

130.Name: Military Headquarters
130.* Attributes: You can pay WMD power resource costs (POWER) by using any resource.

131.Name: Advanced Detection Facility
131.Flavor Text: With our resources, nothing is truly undetectable.

132.Name: Soldier Barracks
132.* Attributes: You can pay soldier resource costs by using any resource.

133.Name: Fortified Greenhouse
133.Flavor Text: A food source safe from the elements.

134.Name: Intelligence Command
134.Flavor Text: We will win the intelligence war.
134.* Attributes: You can pay intel power resource costs (POWER) using any resource.

135.Name: Colossal Warehouse
135.* Attributes: Attach unspent resources to this; they become any type. Enemies can't specify them.

136.Name: G-Titan Missile Silo
136.Flavor Text: We can hit them from anywhere.

137.Name: Hyper Defense Barrier
137.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific building or territory with no other attachments; enemies can't specify it.

138.Name: Advanced Weather Station
138.Flavor Text: We can control a localized region of weather...
138.* Attributes: Find and eliminate 2 weather from an enemy arsenal. They shuffle their arsenal.

141.Name: Triggered Meltdown
141.Flavor Text: We disabled the cooling systems across their network.

142.Name: Instigated Riots
142.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
142.* Attributes: A specific enemy returns 2 soldier forces to their hand.

143.Name: Caused Production Strike
143.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
143.Flavor Text: We kept them from reaching an agreement…

144.Name: Control the Message
144.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
144.Flavor Text: Let's keep this one out of the public eye…
144.* Attributes: Until your next turn, enemies can't change your morale total with intel, WMD, or morale cards.

145.Name: Relentless Raid
145.* Attributes: 4 specific enemy territories each take 100 damage.

148.Name: City-Engine Fortress
148.* Attributes: If damaged by forces, each attacking force takes damage equal to the attack value.

149.Name: Stolen Superweapon
149.Flavor Text: We stole their secret weapon, right under their noses.
149.* Attributes: Find a WMD from a specific enemy arsenal, show it, and put it with your legion. They shuffle their arsenal.

150.Name: Instilling Fear
150.Flavor Text: Let's show them how we wage war…
150.* Attributes: A specific enemy's non-drone forces can't block during the next battle.

151.Name: The Kraken
151.Flavor Text: Nothing can escape this titan's wake.

152.Name: The Black Wave
152.Flavor Text: Air superiority? I don't think so…

157.Name: Hoard of Resources
157.Flavor Text: Even in exile one still has means…

158.Name: The Exile's Trap
158.Flavor Text: Here's one trap that they can't avoid…

159.Name: Roman's Prototype
159.* Attributes: When this attacks or blocks, its enemy discards the top 2 cards of their arsenal.

160.Name: Resource Silo
160.Flavor Text: Tucked away safely in the mountains.

161.Name: Stolen Blueprints
161.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
161.Flavor Text: Without the plans, they can't move forward.
161.* Attributes: Discard 2 building, army, navy, or air forces in a specific enemy arsenal. They shuffle their arsenal.

162.Name: Secret Mission
162.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
162.Flavor Text: Get the information. Then get out of there.

163.Name: Equipment Recall
163.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
163.Flavor Text: This one wasn't quite ready yet.

164.Name: Underground Base
164.* Attributes: Enemies can't specify this until it's 1 of the last of 2 territories you control.

165.Name: Vast Hinterland
165.Flavor Text: We have to go through this worthless place?

167.Name: Rummage
167.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
167.Flavor Text: If there's something here of value, we'll uncover it.

168.Name: Secure Port
168.Flavor Text: Our ships can comfortably refuel and resupply.

170.Name: Clan Temple
170.Attributes: MORALE(2), ATTACK(10, ninja force), HEALTH(30, ninja force)

171.Name: Kiyoshi Nobu, the Devoted
171.Flavor Text: I will serve the Great Emporer!

175.Name: Ruins of the Brotherland
175.Flavor Text: A storied hallmark of this region.

176.Name: Re-Education
176.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

178.Name: Jin Nori, Teacher of Stealth
178.Flavor Text: I will teach them all I know.
178.* Attributes: Ninja forces in your legion are not affected by enemy WMD.

179.Name: Dispatched Agent
179.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
179.Flavor Text: One of our top agents is on it…
179.* Attributes: Discard a soldier from your legion. Find a specific card in your arsenal and put it in your hand. Shuffle your arsenal.

180.Name: Ideal Conditions
180.Flavor Text: Our farms are having a good season.

181.Name: Kai Katsu, Tutor of Fasting
181.Flavor Text: Feel the emptiness, and replace it with mental acuity.
181.* Attributes: You can pay ninja resource costs by using any resource.

184.Name: Delphine Bay
184.Flavor Text: Trading and traveling, from dawn till dusk…

186.Name: A7 Axe
186.Flavor Text: She moves like a blade through the water.

187.Name: Blinding Sandstorm
187.* Attributes: Air forces can't attack or block. Legions lose stealth and seek.

189.Name: Ravager II
189.Flavor Text: A beastly tank that makes all quiver with fear.
189.* Attributes: When this force attacks, its enemy loses 1 morale.

190.Name: Amplified Uplink Facility
190.Flavor Text: Nothing can hide from the sight of our satellites.
190.* Attributes: If you have the most intel, enemy legions lose covert.

192.Name: TXR, Aerial Refueler
192.* Attributes: You can pay air force fuel resource costs (FUEL) using any resource.

193.Name: D7X Detection Disrupter
193.Flavor Text: Now we can fly under the radar.
193.* Attributes: Air forces in your legion are not affected by seek.

195.Name: L1 Needle
195.Flavor Text: Able to slink between enemy fire.

197.Name: F92 Phoenix Reaper
197.Flavor Text: Heaven have mercy on our souls…

198.Name: White Phosphorus Bomb
198.* Attributes: Attach this to a specific bomber in your legion. If it damages an enemy territory, eliminate their soldier and army forces, then discard this card.

200.Name: E-5 Botfly
200.Flavor Text: It pierces its victims, then injects its poison.
200.* Attributes: Can only block non-drone soldier forces. If this loses stealth, it's eliminated.

201.Name: Commander Wilfred Louis
201.Flavor Text: We know your encryption better than you do.

204.Name: Admiral Bancroft
204.Flavor Text: Nothing comes between her and her goals.

205.Name: Riku Ito, Ace
205.Flavor Text: His movements are impossible to predict.

206.Name: Brainwash
206.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY
206.Flavor Text: The trigger phrase will make them totally obedient.
206.* Attributes: Attach this to take control of a specific non-drone force without stealth, an attack value < 100, and a turn cost < 2. If it's eliminated, the owner loses 1 morale.

207.Name: Lorenzo Space Center
207.Flavor Text: Other nations look upon us with envy.

208.Name: Abdul Hafiz, the Supplier
208.Flavor Text: Watch your back. This entire region is his territory.

212.Name: Beam Tank 47-1
212.Flavor Text: The next level in anti-air warfare.

217.Name: A2 Nemesis
217.* Attributes: Takes no damage from soldier or army forces without anti-air.

222.Name: Gemini GX
222.Flavor Text: This wild card makes gusty moves.

223.Name: Dreadnought Six
223.* Attributes: If a non-sub, non-cruiser force blocks this, eliminate it.

224.Name: Triton-1 Ironside
224.* Attributes: Eliminate all enemy buildings with anti-naval.

226.Name: Raxius Geothermal Zone
226.Flavor Text: Giving us a fully energy-independent nation.
226.* Attributes: Gain 1 morale if this produces a generic resource.

229.Name: Vernance Supply Factories
229.Flavor Text: An ideal location for equipment manufacturing.

232.Name: Borblue Natural Gas Site
232.Flavor Text: This gas is extremely dangerous to handle.
232.* Attributes: If eliminated, your territories each take 50 damage.

234.Name: Port of Carmasani
234.Flavor Text: Just off the coastline, a resource reservoir…

235.Name: Secret Naval Region
235.Flavor Text: We can conduct our plans entirely out of sight.

236.Name: Lakeland Oil Grounds
236.Flavor Text: We're able to achieve incredible output.

237.Name: Fusion Power Centers
237.Flavor Text: The first in this new technology.

238.Name: Renzo, the Boss
238.Flavor Text: Chaos can present us with valuable opportunities.
238.* Attributes: If an enemy used an ability from a leader on their last turn, they must skip the draw step on their next turn. Draw a card.

239.Name: Max Harper, Dealer
239.Flavor Text: I'm sure we can come to an arrangement.

240.Name: 00 Black Blade
240.* Attributes: Put this with your legion if it's in your opening hand.

241.Name: Burn Notice
241.Warning Message: LEAD OR BE < 6 AWAY IN INTEL TO PLAY

242.Name: Garrisoned Structure
242.Flavor Text: Looks like a secure spot to set up…
242.* Attributes: Attach up to three soldiers to this after battle; they are not affected by enemy WMD.

243.Name: Selfless Hero
243.* Attributes: Find a specific soldier force in your discard, show it, and put it in your hand.
